summary: Sync repos/<repo> to origin/main, or check out a branch/ref into investigations/.

flags.summary: Check out this branch into investigations/<repo>--<slug>/ instead of syncing main.
Check out this ref (sha/tag) into investigations/<repo>--ref-<sha>/.

subcommands.name: clean
subcommands.summary: Remove stale investigation worktrees (default: older than 14 days).
